channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Biffy Clyro Collaborate with Jamie Campbell Bower During Finsbury Park Concert
item.description: Biffy Clyro delivered a historic performance at Finsbury Park, marking their biggest headline show to date. The Scottish band invited 'Stranger Things' actor Jamie Campbell Bower to join them onstage ...

item.title: Tanzania's Participation in U.S. Health Strategy Raises Data Sovereignty Concerns
item.description: Tanzania has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the United States under the America First Global Health Strategy (AFGHS), a bilateral initiative aimed at strengthening the country's healt...

item.title: Kebbi Governor Inaugurates New Governing Council for AFUSTA University
item.description: Kebbi State Governor, Nasir Idris, officially launched the newly formed Governing Council of Abdullahi Fodio University of Science and Technology (AFUSTA) following a major restructuring that led to t...

item.title: Child Abuse Allegations in Bengaluru Daycare Center
item.description: Recent allegations of child abuse at a daycare center in Bengaluru have sparked widespread concern and calls for immediate investigations. The incident, which involves multiple children reportedly sub...

item.title: Preston weather update: Crawler access issues and troubleshooting steps
item.description: The article discusses technical barriers faced by automated systems accessing News Corp Australia websites. It explains that the platform employs software to manage crawler bot traffic, which may resu...

item.title: Canada's Ambitious Nuclear Expansion Strategy Faces Financial and Logistical Challenges
item.description: Canada's plan to expand its nuclear energy sector by building up to 10 reactors faces significant financial and logistical hurdles. The government aims to attract private investment, particularly from...

item.title: Jamie Vardy's injury status and potential return for Leicester City match
item.description: Jamie Vardy, the Leicester City striker, has provided an update on his injury status following recent setbacks. The 35-year-old forward, known for his goal-scoring prowess, has been sidelined due to a...

item.title: America's 250th Birthday Celebrations Amid Heatwaves and Political Tensions
item.description: The United States is commemorating its 250th anniversary with a mix of patriotic events, political discourse, and weather-related disruptions. President Donald Trump is set to deliver a speech in Wash...

item.title: Springbok squad adjustments ahead of England clash
item.description: The Springbok rugby team has made several changes to its squad for the upcoming match against England. Siya Kolisi and Eben Etzebeth, key players in the team, have been omitted from the starting lineu...

item.title: TPDF warns against violence and misinformation as border security remains stable
item.description: The Tanzania People’s Defence Force (TPDF) has issued a public warning against individuals and groups inciting violence, vowing to take legal action alongside civilian authorities to maintain peace. I...

item.title: The Legacy of Colonialism and Apartheid in South Africa: A Call for Unity and Justice

item.title: Punjab CM Maryam Nawaz Distributes Free Land Allotment Letters to Homeless Families in Jhelum
item.description: Over 600 citizens in Jhelum received free land allotment letters under Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz Sharif’s 'Apni Zameen Apna Ghar' initiative. Minister Bilal Azhar Kiyani distributed the lette...

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi Strengthens Outside Philippine Area of Responsibility
item.description: Super Typhoon Bavi continues to intensify outside the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) as of July 4, 2026. According to PAGASA, the typhoon's maximum sustained winds have reached 205 km/h with ...

item.title: 117 Mindanao Scholars Graduate from Tuition-Free Program
item.description: The article highlights the success of the SMI (Scholarship for Mindanao Innovation) program, which has enabled 117 students from Mindanao to graduate from college without incurring tuition fees. This ...

item.title: Government Announces Official Statement on July 7th
item.description: The Tanzanian government has issued an official statement regarding events scheduled for July 7, addressing public interest and speculation about the date's significance. The announcement comes amid h...

item.title: New Fossil Species of Axolotl Reveals Ancient Presence in Mexico
item.description: Researchers at the National Autonomous University of Mexico (UNAM) have identified a new fossil species of axolotl, Ambystoma quetzalcoatli, in Hidalgo state. This discovery, published in Palaeontolog...

item.title: Coca-Cola Celebrates 75 Years in Nigeria with Bigger 60cl Bottles Offering 20% More Value
item.description: My people, Coca-Cola don clock 75 years for Naija soil and dem no dey joke at all. To mark dis big milestone, di brand don release limited edition 60cl anniversary PET bottles wey dey give customers e...

item.title: Actress Who Played Spock's Mother in Star Trek Reveals Career Spanning 70 Years
item.description: The article highlights the career of a veteran actress known for her role as Saavik's mother in 'Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan.' Now 86 years old, she has worked alongside iconic stars like Katharin...

item.title: Iran holds week-long funeral for slain Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei
item.description: Iran is holding a week-long funeral for its late Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a joint US-Israeli airstrike on 28 February. The funeral processions, delayed due to the ongo...

item.title: Massive Rally in Iran Honors Late Supreme Leader Khamenei
item.description: Iran is hosting a weeklong funeral ceremony for late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, expected to draw millions of mourners. The event, beginning on Saturday, includes public visits to Tehran’s ...
